title: Autoresearch over a Collective + Distributed Candidate Pool — M4 Air, val_bpb=1.9263 (non-record)
author: AnirudhaRamesh
architecture: Transformer with SwiGLU MLP and mirrored recurrence

data.description: Replaced relu² with gated SiLU activation improving bpb by ~0.01-0.02
4 unique transformer blocks reused across 8 logical layers with U-Net skip connections, halving parameter count while maintaining effective depth
Gradient clipping with norm 1.0 for training stability with SwiGLU
Memory management optimizations including setting MXNet cache limit and clearing cache after optimizer steps to fit 16GB M4 Air

novel_contributions: Distributed autoresearch with an evolutionary bandit over a collective candidate pool
Periodic scanning and integration of new candidate submissions to dynamically expand candidate pool
Mirrored recurrence architecture enabling weight sharing across transformer blocks to reduce parameter count and increase training steps within strict memory and time constraints
Use of SwiGLU activation replacing relu² for consistent bpb improvement
Mac-specific training optimizations including smaller batch sizes and adjusted warmdown schedule to maximize training steps in limited wallclock time
Gradient clipping to stabilize SwiGLU training on constrained hardware
Memory management techniques tailored for Apple M4 Air 16GB unified memory environment
